violations.description: Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not accurate or not easily readable. Reach in cooler for lettuce items has broken thermometer. Employee replaced. Temperature gauge to temporary hot hold unit not working. Needs repair.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Counter under char-grill has an accumulation of debris/char. Area around fryer has build-up of grease. Cleaning needed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have an accumulation of food/debris along wall junctures, under equipment/shelving, & in harder to reach areas. Need cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
